narrative:
Lordstown Village B (precinct in Trumbull County) has 955 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.8 percentage points.
